briefs.title: Proposed: Restaurant Use at 8340 Fraser Reach Court, Burnaby — Council to Consider
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to consider a proposal to allow a restaurant use covering approximately 2,217 sq ft (206 sq m) at 8340 Fraser Reach Court. No decision has been made yet — this site sketch is part of the planning review process.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — it could affect nearby food service businesses or your own expansion plans.
